# Arshman Khalid

> One-person AI studio. AI educator helping 7.2 million people every month discover the AI tools and workflows that actually ship.

## About

- **Name:** Arshman Khalid
- **Handle:** @arshman
- **Based:** Maryland, USA
- **Previously:** Data Scientist / Software Engineer at PwC and L'Oréal across 3 continents
- **Recognition:** Top 1% AI Educator (United States) · Top 3% AI Growth Expert (Globally)
- **Audience:** 475k+ followers across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Threads · 20M+ views in Q1 2026 · 2.2% engagement rate

## What Arshman does

- Teaches practical AI on social platforms — every tutorial is a real project being shipped
- Runs a one-person studio consulting with brands on AI tools and creator partnerships
- Has shipped 176+ AI tutorials in 2026 to date
